/usr/lib/ccache/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/oop_petrov_3.dir/oop_petrov_3_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_petrov_3.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_petrov_3.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_petrov_3.dir/petrov_item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_petrov_3.dir/petrov_used_item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_petrov_3.dir/petrov_shop.cpp.o -o oop_petrov_3  /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/libboost_serialization.so.1.86.0 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.15
